creator: mamruoc@gmail.com
text:
The on-board via mini-itx NIC is not been enabled.
The driver is vge.

Text from boot is:

vge0:  port 0xf800-0xf8ff mem 0xfdffe000-0xfdffe0ff irq 18 at device 14.0 on pci0
vge0: MII read timed out
vge0: failed to start MII autopoll
vge0: MII without any phy!
device_attach: vge0 attach returned 6

How-To-Repeat: Download the bootonly image for release 7.0
Boot on a VIA mini-itx gigabit board.
vge nic device not enabled
